sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3044" key="a)kato/pteutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκατ-όπτευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3044.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not in aspect with</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">O.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
